_comment: Phase C perk tree. Loaded by engine/perks.py. Each perk has 3 ranks, 1 perk point per rank. Numeric tuning per rank lives ONLY in engine/perks.py's modifier helpers (get_perk_rank + the per-perk *_bonus/_multiplier functions) -- rank_effects here are player-facing prose only, kept qualitative for capture_bond per the hard no-capture-percentage rule.

perks.name: Capture Bond
perks.description: Your capsules grip tighter with every rank.

perks.name: XP Tuner
perks.description: Tunes your coding-activity XP gain upward.

perks.name: Encounter Magnet
perks.description: Shortens the wait between wild encounter rolls.
rank_effects: Encounter rolls come around a bit sooner.
Encounter rolls come around noticeably sooner.
Encounter rolls come around a lot sooner.

perks.name: Rift Sensor
perks.description: Improves your odds of catching a temporal rift after a commit.
rank_effects: Slightly better temporal-rift odds after a commit.
Better temporal-rift odds after a commit.
Much better temporal-rift odds after a commit.

perks.name: Loot Hoarder
perks.description: Improves your odds of a material drop after battle wins.

perks.name: Candy Refiner
perks.description: Refines more candy out of every duplicate you convert.

perks.name: Drill Sergeant
perks.description: Pushes your creatures to earn more XP from every battle win.

perks.name: Center Overclock
perks.description: Shortens the Repo Center's free-heal cooldown.
